Calculation.Text: Let ( [ TheValue = LeftValues ( Text ; 1 ) ; TheCount = ValueCount ( Text ) ; NewText = Replace ( Substitute ( "¶" & Text & "¶" ; [ "¶" ; "¶|" ] ; [ "|" & TheValue ; "" ] ; [ "|" ; "" ] ) ; 1 ; 1 ; "" ) ] ; Case ( TheCount > 0 ; TheValue & RemoveDuplicates ( Replace ( NewText ; Length ( NewText ) ; 1 ; "" ) ) ) )
